title: WATCH:  Men's Olympic hockey team gets shout out from Trump at SOTU address
fullText: Men's Olympic hockey team gets shout out from Trump at SOTU addressPresident Trump introduced the men's hockey team at the State of the Union, with athletes entering the House chamber wearing their gold medals.February 24, 2026
summary: President Trump introduced the men's hockey team at the State of the Union, with athletes entering the House chamber wearing their gold medals.
